game_name: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

design_philosophy.core_loop: Read descriptive text, parse natural language commands, solve inventory-based logic puzzles to progress through narrative beats from the novel
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Deducing correct puzzle solutions under turn-count pressure while maintaining immersion in comedic sci-fi narrative
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Inhabiting Arthur Dent's role in the Hitchhiker's universe, making decisions that ripple across past and present timelines via the Infinite Improbability Drive mechanic
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberately obscure puzzle design that rejects hand-holding; embraces 'devious' solutions that punish logical assumptions; Douglas Adams' irreverent comedic tone embedded in descriptions and puzzle mechanics themselves (e.g., Nutrimatic tea substitute, Peril Sensitive Sunglasses). Puzzles often require lateral thinking and exploit the absurdist humor of the source material.

difficulty.continues_system: Save/load system allows restart from saved states or beginning
difficulty.checkpointing: Player must save manually at key points; failure on turn-limited puzzles forces restart to saved state or game beginning
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited; puzzles have fixed solutions and strict turn counters that cannot be adjusted. Some puzzles have hard fail states requiring restart. Puzzle deviousness is intrinsic to design, not optional.

progression.upgrade_system: Inventory-based; collecting and deploying specific items (screwdriver, circuit board components, Infinite Improbability Drive modifications) unlocks next puzzle stages
progression.unlock_mechanism: Narrative progression tied to puzzle completion; chapters unlock new ship locations and objectives (Earth evacuation → Vogon ship → Heart of Gold → Magrathea approach)
replayability_hooks: Multiple solution paths for some puzzles reward experimentation
Consulting Hitchhiker's Guide database mid-game for cryptic hints encourages different approaches
Complex time-travel puzzle (manipulating past timelines to retrieve objects in present) requires multiple playthroughs to fully understand mechanics

world_building_techniques: Extensive descriptive text for each location establishes tone and atmosphere
Queryable in-game Guide database provides lore answers and puzzle hints embedded as comedic entries
Physical 'feelies' (included boxed materials like Peril Sensitive Sunglasses, pocket fluff, Vogon destruction orders) extend narrative into physical space
Puzzle solutions themselves advance plot (e.g., assembling tea to power drive changes missiles into whale and petunias)

faction_indicators: Galactic President (Zaphod's identity and theft of Heart of Gold)
danger_signals: Marvin the Paranoid Android's emotional state (blocks ship landing)
environmental_storytelling: Arthur's house destruction order in player inventory
Vogon poetry as narrative and mechanical obstacle
Ship sauna serves as recurring social retreat space
Nutrimatic device dysfunction signals larger system failures
Marvin's closet requires emotional/narrative resolution to access final tools

sources_used: wikipedia: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (video game)
